prompt: My DSSAT simulation finished but I'm confused by the output. It says: pixels_ok=12, pixels_skipped=45, pixels_failed=0, mean HWAM=6200 kg/ha. Why are so many pixels skipped? Is the result reliable?

assertions.text: explains_edge_nan_cause: Response explains that skipped pixels come from coarser AgERA5 or SoilGrids grids not fully covering the CHIRPS extent
distinguishes_skipped_vs_failed: Response clearly differentiates skipped (NaN data, expected) from failed (DSSAT error, concerning)
addresses_reliability: Response confirms result is reliable since pixels_failed=0
provides_inspection_code: Response includes Python/xarray code to inspect HWAM spatial coverage
